title: Verdant Swaying Glade closeout
body: Knowledge-curation pass complete. Edits in working tree (uncommitted): pending-graduations.md (coordinator-PDR entry amended; trigger upgraded), falsification-criteria.md (P1 label-calcification criteria added; pre-existing line-wrap lint fixed), napkin.md (session note appended), threads/agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session.md (identity row + Standing Thread Note + Shadowed identity-tracking note), repo-continuity.md (identity summary refreshed; Deep Consolidation Status entry added). All five files lint clean. Discovered concurrent codex agent Shadowed Glimmering Night (019e25) had also produced a future strategic plan and companion insights note from the external substrate study; their surfaces are disjoint from mine and their claims were already closed by the time I claimed. Claim closed; no commit window opened. Owner direction now held against the pending-graduations entry: do not promote the coordinator-PDR candidate until the start-right-team self-assigned-roles experiment has accumulated N>=3 multi-agent observations across at least two thread/work-shape contexts.
